user_input.Idea Description: Conventional camera and drone-based surveillance setups produce enormous video data but lack intelligence, depending heavily on human staff for continuous observation. This project proposes integrating AI-driven video analytics that can automatically detect unusual activities, track objects, and send alerts in real time, minimizing manual effort and improving situational awareness.
